description: Claude-only parity baseline derived from upstream ccbot behavior and frozen for the multi-runtime rewrite.
status_message_lifecycle: send status when a status line appears
edit the same status message in place while the text changes
convert the status message into the first content part when content arrives
clear the status message when the turn is complete or no longer relevant

tool_use_behavior: track the tool_use message id for later editing
emit tool_use as a visible Telegram message
tool_result_behavior: edit the earlier tool_use message in place when the pair is known
fall back to a new message when the original tool_use cannot be edited

final_result_delivery.contract: the final assistant result is the last semantic content delivered for the turn

interactive_gate.delivery_gate: normal message delivery is suppressed while a blocked prompt surface is visible
interactive_gate.read_only_surface_note: read-only prompt surfaces must not be treated as ordinary chat content

prompt_samples.pane_text:
☐ Choose one
✔ Keep this answer
Enter to select

Would you like to proceed?

ctrl-g to edit in Claude
Esc to cancel

Do you want to proceed?

❯ 1. Yes
  2. No

Esc to cancel
